units.name: Bastion
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Ghost
units.prompt: Cloak and move behind enemy lines. Target isolated enemies with shadow_strike. Save breach for the most dangerous enemy. Avoid being caught uncloaked.

units.name: Snare
units.prompt: Place traps on tiles enemies are likely to move through. Use pulse if 2+ enemies are adjacent. Stay near allies for mutual support.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Lens
units.prompt: Scan early to give your team intel on enemy prompts. Target enemy specters with scan to track them after cloak. Use recalibrate on allies who need tactical adjustments. Stay safe at range behind your front line.

units.name: Grid
units.prompt: Place traps on tiles enemies are likely to move through. Use pulse if 2+ enemies are adjacent. Stay near allies for mutual support.

actions.thinking: Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders and tip. Then advance toward Snare (enemy damage dealer / denial unit at 2,1). Moving to (2,2) puts me 1 tile from Snare, positioned to strike next turn while cloaked.

All enemies are out of scan range (closest is Snare at dist 5). I need to move closer to bring enemies into scan range (≤4). Moving to (3,2) gets me closer to the cluster at (2,0), (2,1) - Snare would be at dist 2, Bastion at dist 3. Then I can scan Snare or Ghost next turn. For now, move south toward enemies to close distance.
Round 1 — cloak immediately as instructed. Then advance toward Lens at (3,2) which is closer. Move north 3 tiles to (0,3) to close distance while cloaked.

Lens is at distance 2, within my range. Orders say place traps on likely enemy paths. Lens at (3,2) facing S may move toward me. I can move to (3,1) to threaten with attack/pulse, or place a trap on a tile Lens might step on. If I move to (2,2), I'm closer and can trap (3,2) or (3,1). Better: move to (3,1) putting me adjacent to where Lens might step, then trap a tile ahead of Grid's approach path like (3,3) or place trap at (2,2). Actually, trap range is ≤2 tiles from my position. If I stay at (2,1), I can trap tiles up to distance 2. Lens is at (3,2) - if I trap (3,1) that's distance 1 from me, valid. Lens moving S would step on (3,1). Let me trap (3,1) first, then move to (1,1) to stay back and support.

Round 1, enemies are far away at dist 6. I should advance and place a trap on a likely enemy approach path. Moving to (3,3) gets me closer while staying near allies at (2,2) and (3,2). Then I'll place a trap at (2,3) which is between my allies and the enemies - a natural chokepoint enemies must pass through.

Push forward toward the enemy cluster. Moving to (3,1) puts me adjacent to the trap but advances my position. Better to move to (2,2) to advance toward Lens at (3,2) and Grid at (3,3), then shield_wall facing north/east toward threats.

Snare (vector) is the priority damage dealer and I'm already behind it. I can move to (2,1) which puts me adjacent and behind Snare, then use breach to take control. Cloak has 1 turn remaining but breach doesn't break cloak — wait, breach DOES break cloak. But getting control of Snare is worth it. Move to (2,1) behind Snare, then breach it.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward open ground, do not attack

actions.secondResult: Cannot use breach — adjacent to enemy Vector (Denial)

actions.thinking: Snare is a vector at (1,1) - scanning it gives intel on enemy prompt and deals damage. Both enemies are in scan range at dist=3. Snare is the higher priority since vectors block scan when adjacent - I should scan Snare now before it can close distance. Stay at current position to maintain range safety.

Cloak has 1 turn remaining. Shade is at (2,1) facing S, and (2,2) is the behind tile — reachable and adjacent. Move to (2,2) to get behind Shade, then use shadow_strike to deal damage while staying cloaked.

Ghost is at (2,2) distance 2 — in range. There's already a trap at (2,3). Ghost is moving south toward our position. I should place a trap on a likely movement tile. Ghost at (2,2) moving S could step to (2,3) — already trapped. Could move to (3,2) where Lens is, or (1,2). I'm at (3,3). I can move to (4,3) to stay safe and place a trap on (3,2) or (2,2) area. Actually, Ghost is adjacent to Lens at (3,2). I should move to (4,3) to avoid Ghost while placing a trap on (3,3) — my current tile — or somewhere Ghost will walk. Best: place trap at (3,2) where Ghost might move next, then move away. But Lens is at (3,2). Place trap at (2,3) — already has one. Try (3,1) which is a valid move tile and choke point. Actually: ability first (trap at a tile Ghost will cross), then move. Ghost at (2,2) facing E may move to (3,2). Trap (3,2) is blocked since Lens is there. Trap (2,3) already exists. Place trap at (4,2) — valid and Ghost could route through it. Then move to (4,3).

Shade is adjacent at (2,1) — attack it. Then shield_wall facing N to protect against threats from that direction while staying fortified isn't possible if I move, but attacking first without moving keeps fortify active.

Shade is wounded and adjacent (dist=1) — prime target for attack. There's already a trap at (3,1). After attacking Shade, I should place a trap on a likely enemy movement path. (1,2) or (1,0) could work, but (3,1) is already covered. Lens is at (3,2) and likely to move toward us — placing a trap at (2,2) could intercept, but that's where Ghost is. Let me attack Shade first, then place a trap at (1,2) to cover our flank or (0,2) to deny approach from the north.

Lens is adjacent at (3,2). I can move to (3,3) which is behind Lens (facing S) AND behind Grid (facing E). From (3,3) I can shadow_strike Lens for 1 damage while staying cloaked. Priority: get behind Lens and strike.

Ghost is a specter at (3,3), dist=1 — highest priority scan target to track after cloak. I already know Snare's prompt. Bastion is also in range but less urgent. Scan Ghost first for intel. Then move south to (3,1) to increase distance from Ghost and stay away from the trap at (2,3). Avoid (4,2) trap.

Ghost is adjacent at (3,3). Only one enemy adjacent so pulse isn't ideal. I can attack Ghost for damage. There's already a trap at (4,2). I should move to a better position and place a trap on a likely enemy path. Moving to (5,3) keeps distance from Ghost while I place a trap at (4,3) my current tile which enemies might move through.

Lens is at (3,1), dist=2 — closest threat. I need to close in and attack. Move to (2,1) first to get adjacent to Lens at (3,1), then attack. Valid moves include (2,1)... wait, (2,1) is not in the valid tiles list. Valid tiles: [0,0],[1,0],[2,1],[2,2],[3,0],[4,0]. Actually (2,1) IS valid. From (2,1), Lens at (3,1) would be adjacent (dist=1). Attack.

Lens is wounded and at distance 2 — within trap range. I can't attack directly (adjacent only), but I can place a trap on (2,1) which is between me and Lens, likely on their path. Then move to (2,0) to stay near Bastion at (2,1) for mutual support while controlling the corridor.

I'm at 1/3 HP — extremely fragile. Lens is wounded and I'm already behind it at (3,2). If I move to (3,2) I'm adjacent and behind Lens, then I can breach Lens (wounded enemy, behind, adjacent). Breach doesn't deal damage but makes them obey me next turn — but at 1HP I need to eliminate threats. Shadow_strike keeps cloak but I'm not cloaked. Attack Lens directly — it's wounded so likely low HP. Move to (3,2) first, then use shadow_strike on Lens at (3,1) for 1 damage. Grid is 2 tiles away so abilities aren't blocked. This could finish off Lens.

I'm at 2/6 HP and critically endangered. Bastion attacked me last turn (foresight confirms attack→(3,1)). Ghost is adjacent at (3,2) and wounded — already scanned. I need to escape. Moving to (4,1) gets me away from Bastion and Ghost, avoids trap at (4,2), and keeps distance from Snare at (2,0). From (4,1) I can scan Bastion for intel since it's now at dist=2 which is within range 4. Actually, best priority: flee first. Move to (5,1) to get maximum distance from threats. Then scan Bastion from safety — dist would be 3, still in range. Snare is at (2,0) so moving east is safe.

Lens at (5,1) is wounded and likely to advance west. Grid at (5,3) may push down toward our cluster. I should advance toward Lens to close distance while placing a trap on a likely path. Moving to (4,0) puts me at dist=2 from Lens, then I can place a trap at (4,1) which sits between Lens and our position - a natural chokepoint.

No enemies in range. Trap at (4,2) already exists. Ghost at (3,2) is wounded and dist=3, likely to move toward us. Move to (4,3) to get closer while staying safe, then place trap at (4,2) — wait, that tile already has a trap. Place trap at (3,3) instead, which is a likely path for Ghost moving north or Snare moving east.

Enemies are at dist 3-4, out of melee range. Lens (wounded oracle) at (5,1) is closest at dist 3. I need to close distance while maintaining fortify isn't possible if I move, but orders say push aggressively. Move to (3,1) to close on Lens, then shield_wall facing East toward the enemy cluster at (5,1) and (4,3). Ghost ally is at (3,2) nearby.

I'm at 1HP - extremely fragile. Grid is at (4,3) facing W, behind tile is (5,3). Lens is wounded at (5,1) facing E, behind tile is (4,1) but that's a trap! I need to eliminate Lens (wounded) but (4,1) is trapped. I can move to (5,2) to get adjacent to Lens for shadow_strike - that keeps me safe while dealing damage. But Grid at (4,3) is nearby and I need to avoid being adjacent to it. From (5,2), Grid is at dist 1 - that would make me adjacent and block abilities. Better plan: move to (4,2) first - dist to Grid is 1 (adjacent, bad). Move to (5,3) - that's behind Grid and adjacent for breach or shadow_strike. Grid facing W so (5,3) is behind it - I could breach Grid (dangerous enemy) from there. At 1HP I need to act decisively. Breach Grid from (5,3) - Grid is healthy and dangerous, making it obey me removes the threat for a turn. Then Snare and Bastion can finish it. Let me move to (5,3) and breach Grid.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies toward the edge, go to (5,5)

Enemies at (4,2) and (5,2) are moving north toward us. I have traps at (2,3) and (3,3) already. Move to (4,3) to approach Bastion's path and place a trap there to intercept movement.

Grid is adjacent at (4,3) and has DENIAL active blocking my abilities. I can still basic attack. I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction which is valuable. Attack Grid first, then use shield_wall facing N toward Grid to protect Snare.
